overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk urban environment at night, transitioning from a covered commercial plaza with digital billboards to a gritty back alley with gang graffiti and residential buildings. The footage is from a video game featuring atmospheric neon lighting and detailed urban decay.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial plaza with large digital billboards mounted on structural pillars. The area is illuminated by purple and pink neon lighting, with an orange kiosk structure visible on the right and a shop with a prominent neon 'OPEN' sign ahead.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the neon-lit shop front where two NPCs stand near the entrance, then proceeding through a narrow passage lined with stacked cargo crates and trash bins. The camera passes through a metal security gate into a back alley with prominent Tyger Claws gang graffiti visible on the right wall.

The camera tilts upward to examine a tall residential building covered in external air conditioning units and balconies, then returns to street level where two NPCs stand near dumpsters and scattered trash bags across the asphalt surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza into the gritty depths of a residential back alley. It begins by gliding through a covered plaza illuminated by purple and pink neon, passing large digital billboards and an orange kiosk toward a shop with a glowing open sign. As the camera moves past the shopfront and its occupants, the environment narrows into a passage lined with cargo crates and trash bins before passing through a metal security gate. The scene then shifts into a dark alleyway marked by prominent Tyger Claws gang graffiti, where the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering residential building cluttered with air conditioning units and balconies. Finally, the view returns to street level to reveal scattered trash bags and figures standing amidst the urban decay of the asphalt alley.
